sc.fiji.snt.analysis.MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters

Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.analysis
Analysis of Trees.
sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds
Scijava-based GUIs for SNT built-in commands.

  • Uses of MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters in sc.fiji.snt.analysis

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.analysis that return MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters
    MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters.defaults()
    Default parameters: weights and thresholds from the nCorrect publication, with intensity thresholds set to NaN (auto-calibrated from bit depth).
    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.analysis with parameters of type MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    MultiSpectralRefiner.refineTree(ij.ImagePlus imp, Tree tree, MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters params)
    Refines all paths in a tree with custom parameters.
    static <T extends net.imglib2.type.numeric.NumericType<T>>
    int
    MultiSpectralRefiner.refineTree(net.imagej.ImgPlus<T> img, Tree tree, MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters params)
    Refines all paths in a tree with custom parameters.

  • Uses of MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters in sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds that return MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters
    MultiSpectralRefinerCmd.readParameters()
    Reads stored preferences and returns a MultiSpectralRefiner.Parameters record, or defaults if no preferences have been stored.
